case_title: TAYLOR BECK VS. UDR TOWERS BY THE BAY LLC

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BECK, TAYLOR AS TO DEFENDANT UDR TOWERS BY THE BAY LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BECK, TAYLOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UDR TOWERS BY THE BAY LLC $461.77 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $526.77 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-01-2024 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-01-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-01-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. PLAINTIFF TAYLOR BECK IS PRESENT APPEARING BY ZOOM. DEFENDANT UDR TOWERS BY THE BAY LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LISA QUIGLEY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: L. YOUNG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
